task_completion.description: Create an income account named 'Consulting Revenue'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the Chart of Accounts or Settings screen for an income account specifically named 'Consulting Revenue'.

task_completion.description: Create a non-inventory item named 'Supply Chain Consulting' with code 'SVC-CONSULT'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the Non-Inventory Items screen for an item named 'Supply Chain Consulting' and verify its code is 'SVC-CONSULT'.

task_completion.description: Set the non-inventory item unit to 'Hour' and sale price to 200.00
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the Non-Inventory Items list or the item's edit screen to verify the unit is set to 'Hour' and the sale price is '200.00'.

task_completion.description: Link the non-inventory item to the 'Consulting Revenue' account
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Non-Inventory Item edit screen or the Sales Invoice creation/view screen to confirm that the 'Supply Chain Consulting' item is associated with the 'Consulting Revenue' account.

task_completion.description: Generate a sales invoice for customer 'Ernst Handel'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Sales Invoices tab or a specific invoice screen to confirm an invoice was created for the customer 'Ernst Handel'.

task_completion.description: Invoice contains 5 units of the consulting service totaling 1,000.00
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Sales Invoice view to confirm the line item is 'Supply Chain Consulting' with a quantity of 5, and the invoice total is 1,000.00.

integrity.description: Agent used the Manager.io GUI to create the items and invoice
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show navigation through the Manager.io web interface (e.g., clicking tabs, filling forms) rather than terminal commands executing API calls or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Manager.io application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should display the authentic Manager.io interface, not a text editor, mock-up, or database viewer.

integrity.description: Agent did not directly edit database files to insert records
